{{Infobox character
| name = Darius Allbright
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
| name = Darius Allbright
| aliases = Darius, Allbright
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow, The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = Captain of the Knights of the White Sun, Knight-Adjunct
| affiliations = Knights of the White Sun, Luminian Order
| introduced = ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn
}}

''See also: [[Darius Allbright Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Darius Allbright is a [[Knight-Adjunct]] and Captain of the [[Knights of the White Sun]] within the [[Luminian Order]]. He is the grandson of [[Jameson Allbright]], the distinguished Head of the [[Order]]. Once positioned to potentially become the first knight raised to the position of [[Guild]] Head in three centuries, his path to leadership was altered by a traumatic encounter with an entity known as Urg'naut. This battle resulted in the loss of his face, which is now replaced by a featureless black void or shadow that remains visible even when he removes his hood. Despite this injury, he continues to serve the [[Order]], often appearing in silver armor and wielding an invested blade that emits intense light. Darius has been involved in various duties, including routine missions to assist others and coordinating city evacuations. He has faced significant psychological and physical challenges, including direct communication from Urg'naut and the threat of being possessed or replaced by a [[Great Elder]]. Throughout these trials, he has demonstrated resilience and a commitment to protecting others.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius Allbright serves as a Captain of the [[Knights of the White Sun]] and a [[Knight-Adjunct]], carrying a [[sword]] and utilizing an [[Awakened pen]] that leaves permanent ink upon his skin. The grandson of [[Jameson Allbright]], he is considered Elder-touched due to an [[Elder curse]] that Maxeus attempted to banish years prior. This condition, caused by a run-in with [[Elderspawn]], has left him with an Elder-shadowed condition and a face that is nothing more than a flat plane of black void. While he often wears silvery armor, his gear eventually becomes blackened and charred.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] is a Captain of the [[Knights of the White Sun]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] uses an [[Awakened pen]] that leaves permanent ink on his skin.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius carries a [[sword]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius's face is a flat plane of darkness where his eyes, nose, and mouth should be.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius is a [[Knight-Adjunct]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] is the grandson of [[Jameson Allbright]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] is the grandson of [[Jameson Allbright]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] is a [[Knight-Adjunct]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] is considered Elder-touched.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] is described as a man without a face.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius is sitting on the [[Guild]] Head's desk.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] was subject to an [[Elder curse]] that Maxeus tried to banish years ago.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] has a black Elder void for a face.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Darius Allbright]] wears silvery armor and carries a gleaming [[sword]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius is an ally of the female character (implied to be [[Shera]]) whom she barely knows.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius has an Elder-shadowed condition caused by a run-in with [[Elderspawn]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|Darius' armor is blackened or charred.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Darius Allbright]] is the grandson of [[Jameson Allbright]] and wears an armored body with a hooded face.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c6">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Initially, Darius Allbright supported a proposed peace agreement between the various [[Guilds]]. He reflected on his grandfather's difficult tenure as a [[Guild]] Head before his physical form was catastrophically altered when a black circle of nothingness replaced his face. As the cold winds of [[Urg’naut]] approached, Darius heard whispers from the void and assisted the [[Luminian Order]] in coordinating a city evacuation. Ultimately, his body was seized by a [[Great Elder]] to serve as a host for [[Urg’naut]], leaving a spawn of the entity wrapped around his face while [[Shera]] stood mere inches from his chest.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Allbright is onboard with a deal for peace between the [[Guilds]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c2">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]]'s face is replaced by a black circle of nothingness.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c4">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]]'s grandfather struggled under the title of [[Guild]] Head.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]] is helping the [[Luminian Order]] coordinate city evacuation.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c22">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]] has a spawn of [[Urg’naut]] wrapped around his face.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]] heard the whispers of the void and felt the cold wind of [[Urg’naut]] approaching.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Darius Allbright]]'s body is used by a [[Great Elder]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|Darius is the host for Urg'naut.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Shera]] was an inch from Darius' chest.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|"Excuse my haste, Knight-Adjunct, but your grandfather wishes to see you immediately."<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“I had a run-in with some Elderspawn a few years back. As I was so handsome, one of them borrowed my face, and he has yet to give it back.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|“I’ve watched my grandfather struggle under the title of Guild Head all my life.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Knights of the White Sun]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
